---
title: "Movies"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
movies <- read_csv("data/rotten_tomatoes_movies.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
movies |>
  ggplot(aes(x = tomatoMeter)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Tomatometer Scores",
    subtitle = paste("n =", sum(!is.na(movies$tomatoMeter))),
    x = "Tomatometer Score",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

```{r}
movies_long <- movies |>
  separate_longer_delim(genre, delim = ", ") |>
  filter(!is.na(genre), genre != "")
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
movies_long <- movies |>
  separate_longer_delim(genre, delim = ", ") |>
  filter(!is.na(genre), genre != "")
```
